text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list: Feeling excited about the Oka Sho?
Feeling excited about the Oka Sho?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But of course! It's one of the Classic races, and
the first battle in the Tiara tour!
choice_data_list: But you'll approach it like any other race, right?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Don't get preoccupied with the race's name.
Just run the whole thing without straining myself.
Right?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hmm! Just leave it to me! I can do anything I
put my mind to!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to go. Don't overdo—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh nooo. All I did was turn it a little!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's still using even more strength than usual.
But she's changed from last year. This time, even
if she's running in a G1—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Waaagh... Wh-what do I do? Glue it back on? Do
you have any superglue?
